title: Foundational Contributions to Data Structures
description: A flowchart illustrating the key contributions of Sartaj Sahni and Susan Anderson-Freed to the field of data structures, their foundational texts, and their lasting impact on computer science education and practice.
elements: Sartaj Sahni: Co-Author of 'Fundamentals of Data Structures'
Susan Anderson-Freed: Co-Author of 'Fundamentals of Data Structures'
relationships: Collaborated to create a seminal textbook
Textbook became a standard for teaching core concepts
Sahni's work influenced advanced algorithm design
Anderson-Freed's work focused on practical implementation and teaching methods
Their combined work established a curriculum foundation
Legacy impacts both academic instruction and industry practice
